Revenue Driven Utilities

Success that powers scarcity
The Metacade (MCADE) token directly benefits from all platform transactions giving it superior, sustainable utility and scarcity. The more we succeed the more valuable MCADE becomes.

Revenue

Recurring
Subscribers
Tournaments
Testing
Advertising
Partner Studios
MCADE
Burn
Staking
Operations
Rewards
Marketing
Burn
Staking
Operations
Rewards
Marketing
Utility

Benefits

MCADE is a deflationary token, meaning circulating supply will be removed permanently from the market
through our buyback and burn model.

How To Buy

There are 3 options
Easy
Purchase with Debit or Credit Card
Buy Metacade with fiat, currently with 0% fees.
For custodial transactions we accept:
  • Visa
  • Apple Pay
  • Google Pay
Choose preferred option
Create Sequence Wallet
Sequence Wallet for Chrome
MetaMask for Chrome
MetaMask for Android or iOS
Trust Wallet for Chrome
Trust Wallet for Android or iOS
Coinbase Wallet for Chrome
Coinbase Wallet for Android or iOS
New to Crypto? Create your Crypto Wallet here
Beginner
Trade on Uniswap
  1. Visit Uniswap Interface v2 and Connect your Wallet
  2. First select desired token to swap
  3. Next select Metacade token
  4. Enter amount then submit
  5. Approve the transaction
  6. Sign the smart contract
Buy on Uniswap
Intermediate
Buy at an Exchange
Buy Metacade with crypto.
Available CEX listings:
  • Bitget
  • BitMart
  • Coinstore
  • More coming in 2024
CEX = Centralized Exchange
